flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Moreno Valley College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Moreno Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Moreno Valley College are 64% above 6-year earnings ($31.8k → $52.1k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Moreno Valley College are 24% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($52.1k vs $42.2k).
